review.text: The crew did fantastic work. Rodrigo gave me a very fair quote, got out here next morning and did a great job removing 3 dead trees and trimming 8 more. The communication was great, and everything was handled very professionally. Highly recommend!

Excellent customer service!
Mr.Rosales is very knowledgeable in his job, will listen to what you want and make suggestions for the best results. 100% recommend!!

We have been using M. Rosales for over 20 years now. They are the best at what they do. Rodrigo is very knowledgeable and his crews are always professional, fast, and safe when it comes to taking down trees or trimming them up. Also great at stump grinding and leave the area spotless when done.
Awesome service, very kind workers & reasonable prices. They showed up on time, communicated well and did a great job. Highly recommend & will absolutely have them back again!

Rodrigo and his crew did a great job in removing a tree and pruning three others. Very professional and punctual. Quite pleased with the service and look forward to using the services in future. Thank you!

I had a great experience with M Rosales Tree Service! I called on a Friday afternoon, and someone was at my house within 30 minutes to have a look at my tree and provide a quote. A crew came the following Monday and provided efficient and professional services. The customer service is great! I will definitely be using them for future services and highly recommend!
Excelente compañia, profecionales,rapidos  en su trabajo,limpieza  y puntualidad.  Nuestra experiencia  con ellos fue exelente 100% recomendados!!
Best in the biz!!!

I was very pleased with this company. They removed multiple mature trees close to the house and ground the stumps. They also trimmed out several more trees. The yard looks very good now. I can recommend M.Rosales Tree Service to anyone needing help with their trees.
Rodrigo and his crew were extremely professional and easy to work with! They did a beautiful job trimming and removing my trees - I highly recommend this company

Rigrido and his guys were professional, efficient, did amazing work, had top notch equipment and most importantly were extremely safe. I will recommend to everyone I know and will never use anyone else!!! He did my next door neighbor as well who is very picky about who he hires.

The service and professionalism is top notch.  I had been needing my trees trimmed for a while but had been holding off because of all the varied quotes I had gotten from random crews in my neighborhood.  I’m happy I was referred to M Rosales because the job was done so well for a really competitive price.  They do it all and do it well.  Highly recommend!

Rodrigo and his crew were amazing today. Started promptly at 800am and were finished cleaning up at 530pm. They  cut down a 50 year old water oak which had fungus growing at the base (sign of decaying roots) and which was leaning slightly towards our house. They also ground down the large stump and trimmed two live oaks. Very professional service. Every large limb was tied off and lowered to the ground gently. All branches were mulched and the trunk was cut into sections and loaded with a skid steer onto a trailer and hauled away. Even after an exhausting day, the crew were meticulous in raking and blowing all the debris and left no trace that they had been here except the mulch from the stump grinder which they offered to spread around our flower beds . Would highly recommend M. Rosales Tree Service.

I’m sure glad my wife held onto the Rosales Tree Service’s calling card. My 60 year old water oak broke 2 boughs in one week, one of which was hanging from the tree with the bough resting on my roof. The tree broke off the upper trunk two years ago from core rot. Mr. Rosales quoted the job to cut down, chip, remove the tree and grind down the stump of this huge tree for a very reasonable price; he said his 5-man crew would be out the next day at which time I agreed to his offer.  All the crew were professional in how they performed their job. Such a great job. I will certainly use his company again for any tree work being done.  Don’t believe those paid “terrorist critics” trying to extort payoffs for removal of their “fake” reviews.

Rodrigo is very knowledgeable & customer service was phenomenal!
My tree’s look amazing.
Provided great tree trimming service in a timely and professional manner!
Excellent tree maintenance service. Experienced, courteous and friendly crew do a professional and complete job with thorough cleaning when done.
Outstanding work and very thorough clean up

I have used M Rosales Tree Service, several times for several different jobs, from a small trim job in a small residential HOA lot to an over grown 1 acre lot. The best service in a very timely manner. They will cut, trim, mulch and haul away all debris and leave your yard better than they found it.
Exelente Servicio ,muy profesional y limpio.
I like these guys already did several projects for me. Reliable!
Highly recommend!  Professional, courteous, and did a great job cleaning up.  Will continue using them excellent service!

Mr. Rosales has been taking care of our trees for many years. Always done a fantastic job and has left our property spotless afterwards. We have a huge live oak tree in the front that is at least 150 years old and it looks fantastic, you will love the way he takes care of your trees and property

Fantastic job by the crew today removing an old oak that was against the power lines.

Would highly recommend and will be using again!

M Rosales tree service did an amazing job removing 4 very tall pine trees from my backyard plus two other trees behind my garage. They also leveled our backyard and trimmed a very large pine in our front yard. It was a two day job and they were fast and professional. They prepped the area to avoid damage and honestly probably left the area cleaner than it was before. Highly recommend!
M. Rosales Tree Service did an amazing job transforming my yard! The team was professional, on time, and paid great attention to detail. Trees were beautiful, and I highly recommend their services!

Our condominiums have used this tree service for several years now. Rodrigo and his crew always do an excellent job from start to finish. They know what they're doing and go about it very efficiently. And the cost has always been fair. Would highly recommend!
I want to say thank Rodrigo and his team M Rosales. They work very fast, clean and professional.  I am lucky to have good one. Thank you for everything you do, Rodrigo

I have use M Rosales Tree Services several times during this year and past years and his attention to details are second no none. Mr. Rosales goes above and beyond to make sure he understands what we want and need. His company is very clean and professional in his line of work. The final results surpass our expectations. If you need a reliable and professional company to make your garden concept a reality, M Rosales Tree Services is the right company.

We use M. Rosales Tree Service for all our properties and tree trimming needs. Rodrigo and his guys have always been professional and very easy to work with. They are experienced and have great prices. They always clean up and go the extra mile to make sure we are satisfied. They also grind up stumps and we have never had a problem with the trees coming back. They are the best in business!

Rodrigo and his crew did an excellent job trimming our 6 large trees. Rodrigo came over within an hour of my call to request a quote. He made me feel comfortable by patiently explaining his approach. His quote was the most competitive. His crew came the following week and had everything done within 5-6 hours. Rodrigo supervised the whole affair which made me feel even more comfortable. They left our property immaculately clean after clearing away all the debris. These guys demonstrated a high degree of professionalism start to finish. The trees look great. Highly recommended.
They were honest and very reasonably priced.  They did good work and showed up when they said they would

Rodrigo and his crew did a great job trimming and tending to my trees and garden.  I’m a repeat customer many times over the years.  Easy and quick to obtain an estimate and get on their schedule. They know where to cut the appropriate limbs without damaging the trees and keeping them in an esthetically-pleasing shape.  They follow good safety practices and clean up afterwards.  My trees look great and stay healthy. Highly recommend.

Very professional and accomodating. The pricing was the best of three different quotes I received. Removed and cleaned everything in a few hours; very efficient. Would definitely recommend and work with again.

I had an excellent experience with Rodrigo! They were professional, efficient, and left my back and front yard looking better than ever. The team handled the tree trimming and removal. They were punctual and cleaned up everything perfectly. I highly recommend them for any tree works. Truly a 5-star service!
Outstanding tree service. Very detail oriented and easy to work with! Highly recommend!
They are professional and skilled. The best tree service I've ever used. They take care to not damage the area. It was impressive to watch them work. They are a great team! Work together well.

Excellent service!  3rd time we have used this wonderful company! From Quote to CleanUp very  Professional, always on time and EXCELLENT clean up!! Thank you so much guys!  Took massive 60 year old Pine down just feet from our front window and hanging over our roofline and not a twig on the roof!!! Our neighbors like you too!!  Extremely good pricing👍👍👍👍👍
Great work - highly recommended!

Rodrigo was quick to return my call and he was able to come out for a quote the same day! He was very knowledgeable about my trees and provided a fair price. Great experience with the crew. They were quick and cleaned up the area as if they were never there. Nice!
Excellent work as always. Have used M Rosales in the past and recommended them to neighbors. Thanks for another well done job
Did a great job trimming dead limbs and cleaning up growth of limbs that were hanging over the roof.  Everything was cleaned up and debris on roof was blown off.
Excellent work, crew arrived right on time, cleaned up everything, and trees look beautiful!  Thank you!
Great service. Would recommend for anyone looking to have their trees professionally trimmed.

WOW! By far the best tree service company we've worked with (and we've worked with several here in the Houston area). Very professional, across the board, and they work FAST, and most importantly, safely.

You can also feel confident that you are working with one company. In our previous experiences, "tree companies" would only do the trimming and cutting, and then bring in one company to grind the stumps, and another to haul away, but this company has it all!

Thank y'all so much!

I have been using this tree service for almost 10 years and they have always provided the best quality service. Rodrigo is amazing and does a great job and identifying all the needs of your different trees. I would highly recommend them for any work you need done in your house.

As usual, Rodrigo and the crew with M. Rosales Tree Services did an excellent job of trimming our 4 trees in Bellaire. We use them every other year or so and they keep the trees looking good!! Their clean up is excellent and they always leave our place better than they find it!! I highly recommend M Rosales Tree Services for your trimming or pruning needs!
The best in the tree business with fair pricing.  I have used them for over 10 years at multiple homes in Houston.
Great service, great price!!!
Professional experienced personal,mindful of your property and does a great job reasonably priced I highly recommend this company.

I’ve contracted their services multiple times over the past three years. You won't find a more professional service company of its kind in terms of competency, capability, diligence, cleanliness (especially important to me), and always competitive. Five Stars is an easy call!
Excellent job!! Very content with service, professionalism, and expertise. I highly recommend this tree service. Great price, timely manner, and professional. I commend your your hard work.
Have been using Rodrigo for years.    Excellent responsiveness, consultation and execution.     Could not really recommend more.

I have used M. Rosales Tree Service for years and am very pleased with their work. They give reasonable bids, finish in a timely manner, and clean up completely after the service. I would recommend them to anyone needing tree service.
M Rosales does a fantastic job for a good price. Would definitely recommend.
Rosales Tree Service is fabulous!  Great service and very professional.

Great service, fast and reasonably priced
Very happy with their above and beyond work
Friendly and professional. Great service with great prices. They are our go to tree service now. Very happy with their work. Highly recommend!
Great service. Great job.

Efficient and professional, Rodrigo and his team swiftly removed a fallen tree . Their skilled team navigated challenges with precision, ensuring a quick and safe operation. I highly recommend their services for prompt and expert tree removal.

They did a great job! Prompt and professional.  They worked much faster than I expected, in an area that has lots of wires and spreads over two houses on a narrow driveway. I will definitely use their services again.

Professional, courteous, safe and clean!

Highly recommend!
Excelente servicio , los mejores de Houston!!

I’ve used this service for several years and always received prompt and professional service each time.  They were recommended by my neighbor who’d used them for over a decade.  10/10.  Highly recommended!
Wonderful service! Rodrigo was great at communication and his team did an overall great job.
I really am thankful that I called him. He was fast, responsive and for that I’m glad he does tree work for us.
Very professional.  Almost if they were never here to take down 4 50ft pines
Rodrigo and team have done great work caring for my trees, I’ve used M Rosales since 2019 and am very happy with their quality results and reasonable prices. Thank you!!
Great Service everyone was very professional and respectful. Trustworthy employees and the quality of the work is top notch.
Very good work very professional
